summary: Full E2E testing of YieldDesk (bond market dashboard). 16/16 backend pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend flows verified: yield curve page, bond screener table, pagination (1/2/3, prev/next), sorting, rating/type filter dropdowns with multi-select, maturity calendar popover, yield range slider, clear filters, navigation between pages, live EST clock, auto-refresh indicator. Export CSV button is clickable and wired to correct API (backend export endpoint verified via pytest).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` is defined at line 197 — AFTER its first use in the startup event (line 78). It works only because the startup event fires after full module import, but this is fragile. Move logging config above the @app.on_event('startup') handler.
server.py: `@app.on_event('startup')` and `@app.on_event('shutdown')` are deprecated in FastAPI; prefer the `lifespan` context manager.
server.py: CORS middleware is added AFTER `app.include_router(api_router)` — this still works in Starlette, but conventionally middleware should be registered before routes.
server.py: `/api/bonds` accepts `sort_by` as a free-form string. Without whitelisting fields, clients can sort by arbitrary fields like `_id`. Consider validating against allowed columns.
server.py: `maturity_before`/`maturity_after` are treated as lexicographic strings. Works for ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` but no format validation — invalid input silently returns all rows.
server.py: seed_data drops and reinserts bonds on every startup — fine for a mock app, but would destroy data in a real deployment. Use upserts or check-and-seed.
YieldCurve.jsx: Auto-refresh silently fails on errors (sets `error` but keeps old data) — acceptable, but consider showing a stale-data indicator.
BondScreener.jsx: `handleExport` uses `window.open(..., '_blank')` — may be blocked by some popup blockers. Consider using an anchor download or fetch+blob for a more robust download UX.
Backend logs were not checked, but all 16 API tests passed so unlikely any runtime issues.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 25 mock bonds to MongoDB on startup — no manual seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API is stable at /api/yield-curve, /api/bonds (pagination/sort/filter), /api/bonds/export. Frontend uses data-testid attributes consistently — e.g., yield-curve-page, bond-screener-page, bond-row-BOND001..BOND025, page-N-btn, sort-<column>, rating-option-AAA, type-option-corporate, export-csv-btn, maturity-calendar. Note: Export CSV uses window.open to a new tab — headless popup event may not fire in Playwright, but the URL/flow is correct. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_yielddesk_api.py can be reused for regression.
